prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PWCCS-13PC-STD-BLCK-BUN-TT Product Type: CHISEL Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Woodcarving Chisel Set Professional Craft and Hobby Tools - 12 Pieces Description: Whether you've just started dabbling in wood hobby projects or are already an expert, our ToolTreaux Wood Carving Chisel Set is a must-have set of essentials for your workshop or crafting area.

Our professional quality tool set comes with 12 chiselss, each featuring assorted tip sizes and shapes ideal for carving figures, details and designs into a variety of wood and clay projects. Some of our favorite projects to create with these chisels are whittling whistles, crafting kitchen spoons, making letter openers and making holiday ornaments.

Each chisel measures 7.75" in length and comes with a tip protector sleeve to keep the tips safe and secured when not in use. The chisels themselves are constructed of high-quality carbon steel and have wooden handles that will help prevent slippage during use.

All of the chisels fit neatly inside of an included PVC pouch so you can keep your tools organized in between uses. Make sure to grab a set of these for yourself whether you're a beginner or a seasoned wood crafter, or gift them to a friend who's a crafting enthusiast. Search Terms: chisel chisel set wood chisel wood chisel sets woodworking tools woodworking hand tools wood glue wood filler wood stain diy diy kits for adults model building kits whittling knife whittling kit for beginners wood carving tools wood carving kit Features: - 12 ASSORTED WOOD CHISELS - ToolTreaux 12pc chisel set comes with (8) high carbon steel chisels, (2) wood rasp files and 1 of each of these styles: a silicon carbide round sharpening stone, a silicon triangular sharpening stone, a combination sharpening block (coarse/fine grit) - TIP PROTECTOR SLEEVS - All chisels included come with a tip protector sleeve to keep the sharp tips safe and secured when not in use; Ideal for crafting a variety of woodworking projects - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Chisels are constructed of high-quality carbon steel that won't rust; Ergonomic wooden handles will help prevent slippage and keep your hands safe during use - STORAGE POUCH INCLUDED - Woodworking tools and accessories fit neatly inside convenient PVC storage pouch to keep tools ogranized in between uses; Easily store them inside of your tool box, tool belt or other crafting supplies - SPECIFICATIONS - Number of pieces: 12 assorted styles; Materials: high carbon steel, wood, PVC; Storage case included: Overall length of chisels: 7.75"; Dimensions of case: 13" x 7" x 3"; Tip protector sleeves included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: High Carbon Steel, Tip Protectors, Sharpening Stones, Storage Pouch, Beginner To Professional

openai.title_differentiation: 12 Assorted Chisels And Sharpening Tools, High Carbon Steel, Wooden Handles, Tip Protectors, PVC Storage Pouch
